title: Golden Portuguese Fish Skewers
description: A citrusy and springy Portuguese dish featuring fish, onion rings, and tempering chocolate, perfect for a midnight craving. This pescatarian-friendly recipe is cooked in a wok.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large wok over medium-high heat.
Add the onion rings and cook until they are golden brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic, paprika, salt, and black pepper to the wok and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cod fish to the wok and cook until it is opaque and flakes easily with a fork, about 5 minutes.
Add the lemon juice to the wok and stir to combine.
Thread the cooked fish and onion rings onto skewers.
Melt the dark chocolate in a double boiler or in the microwave in 30 second increments, stirring between each interval until smooth.
Drizzle the melted chocolate over the skewers and serve immediately.
